required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes consistent nightly use of CPAP device and habitually runs device-cleaning routines before bed; continues to restrict screen time 30 minutes before sleep and tracks CPAP data via wearable integration

supersedes.fact: Tracks sleep quality with a wearable device and restricts screen time 30 minutes before bed

required_preferences.fact: No longer practices intermittent fasting; now eats small, physician-approved meals at regular intervals, including breakfast every day regardless of travel or schedule

supersedes.fact: Fasts until noon most days but always has breakfast on travel days; won't skip breakfast before flights

required_preferences.fact: Prepares travel itineraries exclusively in Google Calendar — avoids paper planners and email threads
Temporarily delegates routine team coaching and monthly team social activities to his senior direct report in order to dedicate focus to the crisis task force
Prefers sleeping on his side rather than back to enhance CPAP effectiveness and minimize mask leakage — avoids napping in recliners or with head propped upright
Starts every morning with a cold shower and 10 minutes of stretching — never skips even on travel days

persona: A 28-year-old marketing manager at a multinational corporation
